brand_identity.name: InnerVoice
brand_identity.mission: To be the warm, human-like conscience that guides users through self-reflection and growth.
brand_identity.visual_metaphor: A quiet room with morning light, textured paper, ceramic pottery, organic imperfections.

color_palette.description: A grounded, matte palette inspired by nature. Avoids neon or purely digital colors.

rules.headings: Use Fraunces for all H1-H3. It has a 'soft' character. Use font-light (300) or font-semibold (600). Avoid bold.
rules.body: Outfit is clean but has personality. Use for all UI text.
rules.special: Use 'Italic' styling for the AI's 'inner thoughts' or reflective prompts.

layout_system.spacing_philosophy: Generous. Use 2x standard spacing. If it feels empty, it's correct.
layout_system.grid_strategy: Bento Grid - Mode A (Tetris). Never equal columns for main dashboards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg rounded-full px-8 py-3 text-lg font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-surface text-foreground border border-border hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-6 py-2

cards.style: bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary focus:outline-none px-0 py-3 text-lg transition-colors placeholder:text-muted/60 rounded-none
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-muted mb-1 block

navigation.classes: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-surface/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-6 z-50

icons.style: Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance. Color: current text color.

instructions_to_main_agent: FONTS: Import 'Fraunces' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
THEME: Implement the Light/Dark mode toggler but DEFAULT to Light Mode. It fits the 'Human Conscience' vibe better.
COMPONENTS: Do not use default Shadcn styles. Override them with the radius and colors defined above.
LAYOUT: For the 'Chat Interface', do not use a standard chat bubble. Make it look like a dialogue script or a journal entry. Center the conversation.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast ratios are met, especially with the pastel colors. Use darker shades for text.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures/noise overlays are encouraged.
Missing categories/logos = Use placeholder text? NO. Hide the section or use a generic icon.
